SEARCH
Package sc.fiji.snt.tracing.artist

Class SearchArtistFactory

java.lang.Object
sc.fiji.snt.tracing.artist.SearchArtistFactory
public class SearchArtistFactory extends Object
Factory for creation of SearchArtists
Author:
Cameron Arshadi

  • Method Details

    • create

      public SearchArtist create(SearchInterface search)
      Creates a SearchArtist for the specified search interface.
      Parameters:
      search - the SearchInterface to create an artist for
      Returns:
      the appropriate SearchArtist
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - if the search type is not supported

      the FillerThreadArtist
